                  def create_single
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                    appointment = Appointment.new(appointment_params)
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                    appointment.save!
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                    schedule_reminder(appointment)
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                    render json: appointment_json(appointment), status: :created
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                  end
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

            
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                  # ── Recurring series ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

            
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                  def create_recurring_series(recurrence_type, sessions)
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

                    interval_days = case recurrence_type
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                    when "weekly"    then 7
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                    when "biweekly"  then 14
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                    when "monthly"   then nil   # use months logic
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                    end
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

            
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

                    group_id   = SecureRandom.uuid
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

                    base_attrs = appointment_params.to_h
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                    base_time  = Time.zone.parse(base_attrs["scheduled_at"])
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

            
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

                    created = []
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

            
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

                    Appointment.transaction do
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                      sessions.times do |i|
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                        scheduled_at = if recurrence_type == "monthly"
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                          base_time + i.months
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                        else
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                          base_time + (i * interval_days).days
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                        end
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

            
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                        appt = Appointment.new(
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                          base_attrs.merge(
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                            "scheduled_at"        => scheduled_at,
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                            "ends_at"             => nil,
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                            "recurrence_group_id" => group_id,
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                            "recurrence_index"    => i + 1,
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                            "recurrence_total"    => sessions
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                          )
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                        )
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                        appt.save!
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                        created << appt
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                      end
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                    end
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

            
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                    created.each { |a| schedule_reminder(a) }
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

            
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                    render json: {
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                      series_id:    group_id,
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                      total:        created.size,
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206.

      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                    }, status: :created
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

            
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordInvalid => e
          
      210.

      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211.

    212. 
            

            

            
          
      213.

                  def schedule_reminder(appointment)
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                    reminder_time = appointment.scheduled_at - 24.hours
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    if reminder_time > Time.current
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                      AppointmentReminderJob.set(wait_until: reminder_time).perform_later(appointment.id)
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                    end
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                  end

                    # POST /api/v1/auth/refresh
          
      54. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    54. 
            

            

                    def refresh
          
      55. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    55. 
            

            

                      raw = params[:refresh_token]
          
      56. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    56. 
            

            

                      record = RefreshToken.find_valid(raw)
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

            
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

                      unless record
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59. 
            

            

                        render json: { error: "Refresh token inválido o expirado", code: "refresh_expired" },
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            

            

                               status: :unauthorized
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61.

      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62.

      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

            
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64.

      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65.

      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            

            

            
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

                      # Rotate: revoke old token, issue new pair
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                      record.revoke!
          
      69. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    69. 
            

            

            
          
      70. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    70. 
            

            

                      new_access_token              = generate_jwt(user)
          
      71.

    72. 
            

            

            
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                      render json: {
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                        token:         new_access_token,
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                        refresh_token: new_raw_refresh_token,

    76.

    78.

      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

            
          
      80.

                    # DELETE /api/v1/auth/sign_out
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                    def destroy
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                      # Revoke access token (JwtDenylist)
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                      access_token = request.headers["Authorization"]&.split(" ")&.last
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                      if access_token.present?
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                        begin
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                          decoded = JWT.decode(
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                            access_token,
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                            jwt_secret,
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                            true,
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

                            algorithm: "HS256"
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                          )
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92. 
            

            

                          jti = decoded.first["jti"]
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            

            

                          exp = decoded.first["exp"]
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                          JwtDenylist.create!(jti: jti, exp: Time.at(exp)) unless JwtDenylist.exists?(jti: jti)
          
      95. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    95. 
            

            

                        rescue JWT::DecodeError
          
      96. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    96. 
            

            

                          # expired or invalid — no action needed
          
      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                        end
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            

            

                      end
          
      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            

            

            
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                      # Revoke refresh token
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                      raw_refresh = params[:refresh_token]
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

                      if raw_refresh.present?
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

                        record = RefreshToken.find_valid(raw_refresh)
          
      104. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    104. 
            

            

                        record&.revoke!
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                      end
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

            
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                      render json: { message: "Sesión cerrada correctamente" }, status: :ok
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                    end
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

            
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

                    private
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            

            

            
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            

            

                    def generate_jwt(user)
          
      113. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    113. 
            

            

                      jti     = SecureRandom.uuid
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            

            

                      payload = {
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

                        sub: user.id.to_s,
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

                        jti: jti,
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

                        exp: 1.hour.from_now.to_i,   # access token: 1 hora
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            

            

                        org: user.organization_id
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

                      }
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                      JWT.encode(payload, jwt_secret, "HS256")
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

                    end
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122.

    123.

    128. 
            

            

                      {

    130.

    131.

    133.

    137. 
            

            

                        trial_expired:        org.trial_expired?,

    140. 
            

            

                        logo_url:             org.logo_file.attached? \
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

                                                ? rails_blob_url(org.logo_file, host: request.base_url) \
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                                                : org.logo,
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

                      primary_color:        org.primary_color
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

                      }.merge(plan_config_for(org))

    145. 
            

            

                    end

    146. 
            

            

                  end

                class DashboardController < BaseController
          
      4. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    4. 
            

            

                  # ── stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      5. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    5. 
            

            

                  # Disponible para todos los planes.
          
      6. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    6. 
            

            

                  # Doctores ven únicamente sus propias citas; admin/recepcionista ven todo.
          
      7. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    7. 
            

            

                  def stats
          
      8. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    8. 
            

            

                    today           = Date.today
          
      9. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    9. 
            

            

                    tz              = ActsAsTenant.current_tenant.timezone
          
      10. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    10. 
            

            

                    week_start      = today.beginning_of_week(:sunday)
          
      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            

                    week_end        = today.end_of_week(:sunday)
          
      12. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    12. 
            

            

                    last_week_start = week_start - 1.week
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13. 
            

            

                    last_week_end   = week_end   - 1.week
          
      14. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    14. 
            

            

            
          
      15. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    15. 
            

            

                    # Scope base según rol
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            

                    appt_scope = doctor_scoped_appointments
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            

            
          
      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            

                    # ── Citas hoy ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            

                    appts_today     = appt_scope.where(scheduled_at: today.beginning_of_day..today.end_of_day)
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

                    today_total     = appts_today.where.not(status: [ :cancelled, :no_show ]).count
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

                    today_pending   = appts_today.where(status: :pending).count
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                    today_confirmed = appts_today.where(status: :confirmed).count
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                    today_completed = appts_today.where(status: :completed).count
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

            
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

                    # ── Tendencia semana actual vs anterior ───────────────────────────────
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

                    this_week_count = appt_scope.where(scheduled_at: week_start.beginning_of_day..week_end.end_of_day)
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                                                .where.not(status: [ :cancelled, :no_show ]).count
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                    last_week_count = appt_scope.where(scheduled_at: last_week_start.beginning_of_day..last_week_end.end_of_day)
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                                                .where.not(status: [ :cancelled, :no_show ]).count
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            

                    week_change = last_week_count > 0 ? (((this_week_count - last_week_count).to_f / last_week_count) * 100).round(1) : nil
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            

            
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            

                    # ── Nuevos pacientes esta semana vs anterior ──────────────────────────
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                    patients_this_week = Patient.where(created_at: week_start.beginning_of_day..week_end.end_of_day).count
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                    patients_last_week = Patient.where(created_at: last_week_start.beginning_of_day..last_week_end.end_of_day).count
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                    patients_change    = patients_last_week > 0 ? (((patients_this_week - patients_last_week).to_f / patients_last_week) * 100).round(1) : nil
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

            
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            

                    # ── Tasa de asistencia (últimos 30 días) ──────────────────────────────
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            

                    last_30      = appt_scope.where(scheduled_at: 30.days.ago..Time.current).where.not(status: [ :cancelled, :no_show ])
          
      39.

                class InventoryController < BaseController

                  # GET /api/v1/inventory
          
      5. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    5. 
            

            

                  def index
          
      6. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    6. 
            

            

                    products = Product.active.order(:name)
          
      7. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    7. 
            

            

                    products = products.by_name(params[:q])           if params[:q].present?
          
      8. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    8. 
            

            

                    products = products.by_category(params[:category]) if params[:category].present?
          
      9. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    9. 
            

            

                    products = products.low_stock                      if params[:low_stock] == "true"
          
      10. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    10. 
            

            

            
          
      11. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    11. 
            

            

                    pagy, products = pagy(products, limit: params[:per_page] || 20)
          
      12. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    12. 
            

            

            
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13. 
            

            

                    render json: {
          
      14. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    14. 
            

            

                      data:       products.map { |p| product_json(p) },
          
      15. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    15. 
            

            

                      pagination: pagy_metadata(pagy)
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            

                    }
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            

                  end

    18. 
            

            

            
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            

                  # GET /api/v1/inventory/:id
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

                  def show
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

                    product = Product.find(params[:id])
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                    movements = product.stock_movements.order(created_at: :desc).limit(50)
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                    render json: product_json(product).merge(movements: movements.map { |m| movement_json(m) })
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

                  end

    60. 
            

            

                                        .order("stock_movements.expiration_date ASC")

      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65.

                  # ── Período ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      26.

                  def parse_period
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                    if params[:start_date].present? && params[:end_date].present?
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                      @start_date = params[:start_date].to_date
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            

                      @end_date   = params[:end_date].to_date
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            

                    else
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            

                      now         = Time.current
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                      @start_date = now.beginning_of_month.to_date
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                      @end_date   = now.to_date
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                    end
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

            
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            

                    duration    = (@end_date - @start_date).to_i + 1
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            

                    @prev_start = @start_date - duration.days
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39. 
            

            

                    @prev_end   = @start_date - 1.day
          
      40. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    40. 
            

            

                  end
          
      41. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    41. 
            

            

            
          
      42. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    42. 
            

            

                  def period_scope
          
      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                    Appointment.by_range(@start_date, @end_date)
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44. 
            

            

                  end
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

            
          
      46. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    46. 
            

            

                  def prev_scope
          
      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47. 
            

            

                    Appointment.by_range(@prev_start, @prev_end)
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48. 
            

            

                  end
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

            
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

                  # ── Resumen con comparativa ────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

            
          
      52. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    52. 
            

            

                  def summary_stats
          
      53. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    53. 
            

            

                    curr = status_counts(period_scope)
          
      54. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    54. 
            

            

                    prev = status_counts(prev_scope)
          
      55. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    55. 
            

            

            
          
      56. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    56. 
            

            

                    total_curr = curr.values.sum
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

                    total_prev = prev.values.sum
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

            
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59. 
            

            

                    {
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            

            

                      total:                  total_curr,
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61. 
            

            

                      completed:              curr[:completed].to_i,
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                      cancelled:              curr[:cancelled].to_i,
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                      no_show:                curr[:no_show].to_i,
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            

            

                      pending:                curr[:pending].to_i,
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            

            

                      confirmed:              curr[:confirmed].to_i,
          
      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            

            

                      in_progress:            curr[:in_progress].to_i,
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

                      completion_rate:        pct(curr[:completed], total_curr),
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                      cancellation_rate:      pct(curr[:cancelled], total_curr),
          
      69. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    69. 
            

            

                      no_show_rate:           pct(curr[:no_show], total_curr),
          
      70. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    70. 
            

            

                      # Período anterior
          
      71. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    71. 
            

            

                      prev_total:             total_prev,
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

                      prev_completed:         prev[:completed].to_i,
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                      prev_completion_rate:   pct(prev[:completed], total_prev),
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                      prev_cancellation_rate: pct(prev[:cancelled], total_prev)
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                    }
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                  end
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

            
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                  def status_counts(scope)
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                    scope.group(:status).count.transform_keys(&:to_sym)
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                  end
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

            
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                  def pct(part, total)
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                    return 0.0 if total.to_i.zero?
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                    ((part.to_f / total) * 100).round(1)
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                  end
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

            
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                  # ── Funnel de conversión ───────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

            
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                  def funnel_stats
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

                    total     = period_scope.count
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                    confirmed = period_scope.where(status: %i[confirmed in_progress completed no_show]).count
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92. 
            

            

                    completed = period_scope.where(status: :completed).count
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            

            

            
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                    [
          
      95. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    95. 
            

            

                      { stage: "Agendadas",   count: total,     pct: 100.0 },
          
      96. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    96. 
            

            

                      { stage: "Confirmadas", count: confirmed, pct: pct(confirmed, total) },
          
      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                      { stage: "Completadas", count: completed, pct: pct(completed, total) }
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            

            

                    ]
          
      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            

            

                  end
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

            
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                  # ── Citas por día de semana ────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

            
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103.

      104. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    104. 
            

            

                    days = %w[Dom Lun Mar Mié Jue Vie Sáb]
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                    counts = period_scope
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

                      .group(Arel.sql("EXTRACT(DOW FROM scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::integer"))
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                      .count
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                    (0..6).map { |i| { day: days[i], count: counts[i].to_i } }
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109.

                      .sort_by { |r| -r[:count] }
          
      119.

                      period_scope

                        .order(Arel.sql("1 ASC"))

                    elsif duration <= 92

                        .group(Arel.sql("DATE_TRUNC('week', scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')"))

                        .order(Arel.sql("1 ASC"))

                        .count

              def expiring_soon?(days = 7)

              def trial_expired?

              def find_schedule

              def generate_slots(schedule)
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                slots    = []
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30.

      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31.

    32. 
            

            

                end_time = Time.zone.parse("#{@date} #{schedule.end_time.strftime('%H:%M')}")

    33. 
            

            

            
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                while current + duration <= end_time
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                  slots << { starts_at: current, ends_at: current + duration }
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

                  current += duration
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37.

              def find_booked_slots
          
      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                # Use Time.zone so the day window is in the org's local timezone, not UTC.
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44.

      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

                day_end   = Time.zone.parse(@date.to_s).end_of_day

    46. 
            

            

            
          
      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47. 
            

            

                @doctor.appointments
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48. 
            

            

                       .where(status: [ :pending, :confirmed, :in_progress, :completed ])
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

                       .where(scheduled_at: day_start..day_end)
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

                       .pluck(:scheduled_at, :ends_at)
          
      51.

                       .pluck(:start_datetime, :end_datetime)

              def booked?(slot, booked_slots)
